sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39426" key="e)piqera/peusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιθερᾰ´π-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Rhet., <sense id="n39426.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">indignant reiteration of a charge</tr_>, <pb n="634" TEIform="pb"/> Ps.-Ascon. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in Verr.Act.</tr_>i § <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
